innateAbility.name: To Hell and Back
innateAbility.description: Both kills and assists credited to Lion now grants self an outgoing debuff duration amplification corresponding to death-affected enemy hero's respawn time.

abilities.name: Earth Spike
abilities.description: Rock spikes burst from the earth along a straight path.Enemy units are hurled into the air, then are stunned and take damage when they fall.

abilities.name: Hex
abilities.description: Transforms an enemy unit into a harmless beast, with all abilities disabled.

abilities.name: Mana Drain
abilities.description: Channels and draws mana for the affected unit for Lion himself, while applying a movement speed slow.

abilities.name: Finger of Death
abilities.description: Deals damage to the unit-targeted enemy after an effect delay.

abilities.name: Fist of Death
abilities.description: Turns Lion into a melee unit upon cast, with attacks having melee behavior and cleaves briefly.

talents.right: +20 Finger of Death Spell Damage/Attack Damage Bonus per Kill

talents.left: +15% To Hell and Back Debuff/Spell Damage Amp
